title: Romantic Crispy Thai Chicken Satay
description: A herbal and crispy Thai dish featuring malai and coconut cream, perfect for a romantic evening, with a Mediterranean twist.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut cream, malai, fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, coriander, cumin, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken skewers to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook in the oven for 20 minutes.
While the chicken is cooking, heat the peanut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Once the chicken is done, add it to the skillet and cook for an additional 5 minutes, until crispy.
Serve the chicken satay hot, garnished with fresh herbs and a side of coconut cream sauce.
To make the coconut cream sauce, simply whisk together the remaining marinade and cook in the skillet over low heat until heated through.
